title: Open the app and navigate to the Checkout 51 screen
test_steps: Open the Checkout 51 app. | Verify the app name 'Checkout 51' is displayed in the header. | Click on the 'All Categories' option in the navigation bar.
expected_result: The app should open successfully. | The app name 'Checkout 51' should be visible in the header. | The 'All Categories' option should be clickable.

title: Verify the list of cashback offers
test_steps: Navigate to the 'All Categories' section. | Verify the list of cashback offers includes images, product names, and cashback amounts.
expected_result: The list should display cashback offers with images, product names, and cashback amounts.

title: Click on a cashback offer to view details
test_steps: Select a cashback offer from the list. | Click on the selected cashback offer to view its details.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the details page of the selected cashback offer.

title: Verify the 'Earn Free Books' sponsored message
test_steps: Navigate to the Checkout 51 screen. | Verify the 'Earn Free Books' sponsored message is displayed.
expected_result: The 'Earn Free Books' sponsored message should be visible on the screen.

title: Click on the 'Home' button in the footer
test_steps: Navigate to the Checkout 51 screen. | Click on the 'Home' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the home screen.

title: Click on the 'Upload Receipt' button in the footer
test_steps: Navigate to the Checkout 51 screen. | Click on the 'Upload Receipt' button in the footer.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the receipt upload screen.

title: Verify navigation between categories and stores
test_steps: Navigate to the Checkout 51 screen. | Click on the 'All Categories' option in the navigation bar. | Click on a specific category. | Click on the 'All Stores' option in the navigation bar. | Click on a specific store.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the selected category or store.

title: Verify the user profile icon in the header
test_steps: Navigate to the Checkout 51 screen. | Click on the user profile icon in the header.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the user profile screen.
